name: fleet-refresh-0-19-3
title: Roll out sd-ai-command-pack 0.19.8 to the fleet
description: Refresh every stale registered consumer to the corrected pack release 0.19.8 after integration and source review stopped the original 0.19.3 rollout.
creator: sdelmas
notes: The rollout began at 0.19.3. Loadsmith PR #90 surfaced a pack-owned file-path resolution defect in sd-status, so the rollout stopped. Source PR #154 merged the first correction as 0.19.4, but its squash merge exposed a main-push guard assumption and prevented tagging. Source PR #155 now carries the guard recovery plus follow-up status and preflight hardening as release 0.19.8; rollout resumes only after that exact release merges, passes main CI, and is tagged.
